definitions: 居民；栖息者；居住在某地的人或动物

examples.text: Within it, an ancient solitary tree quietly watched over the inhabitants of the forest.
examples.explanation: 这里 inhabitants 指“居民、栖息者”，the inhabitants of the forest 就是“森林里的居民/生物”。

source.text: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time – Nintendo Direct 6.9.2026

relations.reason: inhabitants 表示“居民、居住者”，与 dweller 的核心含义高度重合；当前例句中还直接出现 inhabitants of the forest 与 forest dwellers 的同指关系，适合建立近义跳转。
